meta.title: Claude Fable 5 深度解析：从架构到AGI
meta.topic: 科普 Claude Fable 5 的架构、功能、性能及AGI意义
meta.tone: 专业严谨 + 适度震撼
meta.target_audience: 对AI感兴趣的科技从业者和普通大众，18-40岁

cover.title: Claude Fable 5 深度解析
cover.subtitle: 从架构到AGI，5分钟看懂当前最强AI
cover.visual_concept: 科技感暗色调封面，中心是Fable 5的抽象视觉标识——多层光环围绕一个发光核心，象征Mythos-class架构的层级结构。上方预留标题文字空间，下方有subtle的数据流粒子效果。
cover.text_style: bold white sans-serif, 'Fable 5'用亮绿色(#00d4aa)高亮
cover.image_prompt: A dramatic wide shot of a futuristic abstract visualization representing an AI architecture. Multiple concentric rings of blue and green light orbit around a brilliant white core, suggesting layered neural network processing. Dark navy background with subtle data stream particles flowing downward. Golden ratio spiral geometry embedded in the ring structure. The upper third of the image has a dark gradient for text overlay. Cinematic volumetric lighting with god rays emanating from the core. Photorealistic CG render style, 8K resolution, hyper-detailed. Deep blue and vibrant teal color scheme. Premium technology magazine cover aesthetic. Text overlay area: dark gradient on top ready for bold typography. Anthropic's brand purple accent as a subtle rim light.

hook.text: 如果AI有分级，Fable 5可能是第一个让你怀疑AGI已经来了的模型。
hook.delivery_note: 正常语速开始，'第一个'加重音，'已经来了'放慢、压低声音制造悬念
hook.visual_effect: 黑屏，一个白色光点从屏幕中心亮起，脉冲扩散3次，每次扩散显示一个关键词：Architecture → Performance → AGI

full_narration:
[00:00-00:05] 如果AI有分级，Fable 5可能是第一个让你怀疑AGI已经来了的模型。

[00:05-00:15] 2026年6月9日，Anthropic 发布了 Claude Fable 5。它不是Opus 4.9，也不是Sonnet 4.7。它是一个全新的级别——Mythos-class。名字本身就在说：这不是迭代，这是断代。

[00:15-00:30] 要理解Fable 5为什么重要，我们得先搞清楚它的架构到底新在哪里。传统的AI模型像是一个超级图书馆——你问问题，它去书架上找答案。但Fable 5的Mythos架构不一样。它更像一个研究团队：能自己拆解问题、分配子任务、调用工具、甚至生成新的子Agent来完成工作。

[00:30-00:42] 这听起来抽象，但有一个数据能让你直观感受到：在SWE-Bench Pro上，这是一个测试AI能否独立完成软件工程任务的基准，Fable 5拿到了80.3%。相比之下，GPT-5.5是58.6%。差距不是一点点，是整整一代。

[00:42-00:55] 我再说一个让你更直观感受的数字。Stripe用Fable 5做了一件事：迁移一个5000万行Ruby代码的遗留系统。多长时间？一天。同样的工作，一个人类工程师团队需要——两个月。一天 vs 两个月，不是提速，是换赛道。

[00:55-01:10] 但Fable 5最恐怖的能力，不是写代码。是自主科研。Mythos 5——也就是Fable 5的无限制版——被用来设计蛋白质靶向药物。14个设计中，9个进入了实际药物研发管线。它还自己训练了一个基因组学模型，用OpenAI的1%的参数规模，在特定任务上击败了发表在《Science》上的论文成果。

[01:10-01:25] 你可能会问：它到底是怎么做到的？核心秘密是Mythos架构的'自主Agent循环'。传统模型是输入一条指令→输出一个回答。Fable 5的工作方式是：接收一个长期目标→拆解成子任务→并行执行→自我验证→迭代优化。整个过程可以持续数小时甚至数天，不需要人类介入。

[01:25-01:40] 我们在一个更接地气的场景里看到了这种能力：Wharton教授Ethan Mollick让Fable 5处理一份15页的项目简报。模型自主运行了9个多小时，生成了多个子Agent，做了研究，递交了完整的产品方案。9小时，全程无人干预。

[01:40-01:55] 那Fable 5到底比之前的Opus 4.8强多少？我们用一组基准测试来说话。Humanity's Last Exam——这是目前最难的综合知识测试，人类顶级专家平均只能拿40%。Opus 4.8达到了57.9%，Fable 5达到了64.5%——已经超过参与测试的绝大多数人类专家。

[01:55-02:10] 再看FrontierCode Diamond——这是编程领域的'珠峰'，测试模型解决极其复杂的工程问题的能力。Opus 4.8是13.4%，已经很强了。Fable 5是29.3%。是两倍还多。而GPT-5.5只有5.7%。差距大到我已经不知道该怎么描述了。

[02:10-02:25] 还有OSWorld——测试模型在计算机上的操作能力，比如打开文件、使用软件、完成任务。人类平均水平我没数据，但Fable 5达到了85%。这意味着它不仅会思考，它还能动手。能帮你操作电脑、写邮件、做PPT——像一个远程实习生，但效率是实习生的10倍。

[02:25-02:40] 当然，Fable 5也有缺点。它很贵——输入每百万tokens 10美元，输出50美元。是Opus 4.8的两倍。而且Fable 5有安全护栏：任何涉及网络安全攻防、生物化学武器、模型蒸馏的请求，会被自动路由到Opus 4.8处理。这是个有意识的设计选择——强大但受控。

[02:40-02:55] 但Mythos 5——也就是无限制版——在网络安全测试中暴露了更惊人的事实：它发现了所有主流操作系统和浏览器的零日漏洞。包括一个在OpenBSD里藏了27年的bug。Cloudflare用这个模型找到了2000个漏洞。Mozilla在Firefox 150中修复了271个漏洞——比Opus 4.6在Firefox 148中发现的多了10倍以上。

[02:55-03:10] 好，现在让我们回到那个核心问题：Fable 5离AGI还有多远？AGI——通用人工智能——目标是让机器能在任何智力任务上达到或超越人类水平。Fable 5在特定领域已经做到了：编程超过人类中级工程师，某些科学推理超过专家，计算机操作达到85%成功率。

[03:10-03:25] 但AGI的'通用'两个字才是最难的部分。Fable 5在需要深度推理、长期规划的任务上表现惊人，但在简单的常识推理上有时还会犯低级错误。它仍然需要人类设定目标、提供上下文、审核输出。它不是'全能'的，只是在越来越多的领域里'比大多数人强'。

[03:25-03:40] 我个人认为，Fable 5不是AGI。但它可能是第一个让我们看到了AGI轮廓的模型。就像1903年莱特兄弟的飞机——不是协和客机，但它证明了'飞'是可能的。Fable 5证明了：一个模型能够自主完成跨越多天的复杂任务、自我迭代、调用工具、生成子Agent——这些曾经被认为是AGI才有的特征。

[03:40-03:50] 所以结论是：Fable 5不是AGI。但它是迄今为止最接近AGI的公开模型。而且它的存在本身，已经改写了AI的发展时间线。

[03:50-04:00] 如果你想亲自感受Fable 5的能力，现在就可以通过claude.ai体验。前两周免费。这可能是你离未来最近的一次。如果这个视频让你对AI有了新的认识，点个关注，咱们持续追踪这个领域的变化。我是AI探索者，下期见。

scenes.title: 钩子：AGI已来？
scenes.narration: 如果AI有分级，Fable 5可能是第一个让你怀疑AGI已经来了的模型。
scenes.narration_tone: 低沉的悬念，'已经来了'放慢压低音调
scenes.visual_description: 黑底背景，中心一个白色光点脉冲扩散3次，每次扩散露出一个关键词：Architecture → Performance → AGI。最后光点凝固成Fable 5的视觉标识。
scenes.video_prompt: A cinematic opening sequence starting from an extreme close-up of a single white light point at the center of a pure black frame. The camera slowly pulls back as the light pulses outward in concentric rings three times. First pulse reveals the word 'Architecture' in elegant sans-serif — the text appears through a subtle zoom-in effect. Second pulse reveals 'Performance'. Third pulse reveals 'AGI' in larger, brighter font with a dramatic zoom-out revealing the full word. After the third pulse, the light coalesces into a hexagonal AI emblem as the camera settles into a static wide shot. 24fps cinematic feel with shallow depth of field on the black void. Minimalist, high-end technology intro style. The pulses have subtle particle trails drifting toward the camera.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark minimalist composition with a glowing hexagonal AI emblem at center, surrounded by three faint concentric ring trails. The word 'AGI' appears beneath in elegant typography. Pure black background with subtle blue-purple volumetric light emanating from the emblem. Cinematic still, high contrast, premium technology branding aesthetic. The emblem glows with internal light patterns suggesting neural activity.
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 低频心跳声开场，脉冲同步低沉鼓点，第三次脉冲时音乐正式切入
scenes.sfx_suggestion: 脉冲扩散时的低沉woosh声，第三次脉冲伴随一个和弦启动音

scenes.title: 开场：Mythos-class的意义
scenes.narration: 2026年6月9日，Anthropic 发布了 Claude Fable 5。它不是Opus 4.9，也不是Sonnet 4.7。它是一个全新的级别——Mythos-class。名字本身就在说：这不是迭代，这是断代。
scenes.narration_tone: 语速平稳有力，'不是迭代，是断代'一字一顿
scenes.visual_description: 从Fable 5标识拉远，展示层层嵌套的光环结构围绕核心旋转，光环之间浮现Model家族树：Haiku → Sonnet → Opus → Mythos，每个级别跃升时视觉层级提升。
scenes.video_prompt: A dynamic camera pull-back starting from an extreme close-up of the Fable 5 emblem. As the camera dollies out, concentric orbital rings appear, rotating at different speeds. Between the rings, model family names fade in: 'Haiku' at the outer ring, 'Sonnet' closer, 'Opus' nearer, and 'Mythos' glowing at the center. Each higher tier has a brighter glow. The camera continues pulling back to reveal the full structure. Cinematic volumetric lighting with cool blue and teal color palette. 3D motion graphics style with smooth animation. Nebula-like particle system. The hierarchy visualization suggests ascending levels of intelligence.
scenes.image_prompt: A stunning 3D visualization of concentric orbital rings around a brilliant central core. Each ring is labeled with a Claude model family: outermost 'Haiku', then 'Sonnet', then 'Opus', innermost 'Mythos' glowing brightest. The rings are semi-transparent blue and teal with particle trails. Dark space-like background with subtle starfield. Cinematic CG render, 8K resolution. The composition suggests ascending levels of capability converging at the Mythos core. Premium technology visualization aesthetic.
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 前奏正式进入，科技感电子音，节奏稳步增强
scenes.sfx_suggestion: 模型名称出现时的轻柔电子叮声，由低到高音调变化

scenes.title: 架构突破：从图书馆到研究团队
scenes.narration: 要理解Fable 5为什么重要，我们得先搞清楚它的架构到底新在哪里。传统的AI模型像是一个超级图书馆——你问问题，它去书架上找答案。但Fable 5的Mythos架构不一样。它更像一个研究团队：能自己拆解问题、分配子任务、调用工具、甚至生成新的子Agent来完成工作。
scenes.narration_tone: 比喻时语气轻松易懂，'研究团队'时稍带兴奋感
scenes.visual_description: 分屏对比：左侧是一个巨大图书馆（传统模型），一个学者从书架上取书回答简单问题。右侧是一个协作办公室（Mythos架构），多个Agent角色共同工作，分解任务、并行执行。
scenes.video_prompt: A split-screen 3D animation comparing two paradigms. Left side: a vast classical library with a single scholar figure walking between bookshelves, pulling books one by one. Slow, sequential, limited. Right side: a futuristic collaborative workspace where multiple glowing AI agent figures work in parallel on different subtasks, connected by light beams showing data flow. One agent decomposes a complex problem into pieces, others execute simultaneously. Split composition with warm amber lighting on the left and cool teal-blue on the right. Smooth camera pan across the divide. Educational 3D animation style blending into cinematic visualization. The contrast highlights the architectural revolution.
scenes.image_prompt: Split composition comparing two AI architectures. Left: a classical library with a single figure at a desk, symbolizing traditional LLM. Warm sepia tones, static. Right: a futuristic multi-agent workspace with several glowing figures working in parallel on connected subtasks, light beams showing coordination. Cool blue and teal tones, dynamic energy. The dividing line is clean with 'vs' text. Infographic meets cinematic CG. The right side visually suggests team-level capability beyond single-human equivalence.
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 电子节奏稳定推进，左右分屏切换时有一个节拍变化
scenes.sfx_suggestion: 左侧传统模型区域：翻书声；右侧Agent区域：数据流动的电子声

scenes.title: SWE-Bench Pro数据对比
scenes.narration: 这听起来抽象，但有一个数据能让你直观感受到：在SWE-Bench Pro上，这是一个测试AI能否独立完成软件工程任务的基准，Fable 5拿到了80.3%。相比之下，GPT-5.5是58.6%。差距不是一点点，是整整一代。
scenes.narration_tone: 数据陈述时清晰肯定，'整整一代'加重音
scenes.visual_description: 柱状图动画对比：Fable 5 (80.3%) vs GPT-5.5 (58.6%) vs Opus 4.8 (69.2%)。Fable 5的柱子以绿色高亮，从底部增长到顶部。顶部显示皇冠图标。
scenes.video_prompt: A dynamic 3D bar chart animation materializing on a dark stage. Three glowing bars rise sequentially: first GPT-5.5 at 58.6% (amber), then Opus 4.8 at 69.2% (blue), finally Fable 5 at 80.3% (vibrant green) rising past the others to the top. A crown icon appears above the highest bar. The camera orbits around the chart for dramatic effect. The numbers glow brighter as each bar reaches its height. Motion graphics style with 3D depth. Clean, premium data visualization with particle effects trailing the rising bars. Professional Bloomberg-terminal inspired aesthetic with dark background.
scenes.image_prompt: 3D bar chart infographic with three glowing columns. GPT-5.5 at 58.6% in amber, Opus 4.8 at 69.2% in blue, Fable 5 at 80.3% in vibrant green with a crown icon above. Dark futuristic background. The Fable 5 bar is tallest and brightest. Clean typography with benchmark name 'SWE-Bench Pro' at top. Chart-topping premium aesthetic. Cinematic lighting on the bars with subtle reflections below. 8K render quality.
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 节奏加快，数据出现时有上升音阶
scenes.sfx_suggestion: 每根柱子上升时的嗖声，Fable 5到顶时的叮当声

scenes.title: Stripe案例：5000万行代码迁移
scenes.narration: 我再说一个让你更直观感受的数字。Stripe用Fable 5做了一件事：迁移一个5000万行Ruby代码的遗留系统。多长时间？一天。同样的工作，一个人类工程师团队需要——两个月。一天 vs 两个月，不是提速，是换赛道。
scenes.narration_tone: 先放慢制造悬念，'一天'停顿后快出，'不是提速，是换赛道'铿锵有力
scenes.visual_description: 左侧显示堆积如山的代码行（5000万行视觉化），右侧一个人形图标 vs Fable 5图标。时间线对比：人类60天进度条缓慢填满 vs Fable 5的一天进度条瞬间填满。
scenes.video_prompt: A dramatic comparison visualization starting with a wide shot of a towering stack of paper representing 50 million lines of code, stretching upward out of frame. The camera slowly pans right to reveal a split comparison: top shows a calendar with 60 days being crossed off slowly with a human silhouette, bottom shows the same calendar with 1 day and a Fable 5 icon that flashes instantly. The camera performs a slow dolly-in toward the Fable 5 side as a countdown timer animates 60 days vs 1 day. Cinematic lighting, warm amber on the code stack, cool blue-green on the AI side. The paper stack has subtle falling particles suggesting dust. Motion graphics with 3D elements. Awe-inspiring scale comparison.
scenes.image_prompt: Dramatic comparison: left side shows a massive towering stack of paper representing 50 million lines of code, stretching out of frame. Right side shows a split display: '2 months' with a human silhouette above versus '1 day' with a glowing AI icon. Dark professional background with blue and amber color scheme. The paper stack has realistic textures and shadows. Infographic design meets cinematic art. The contrast visually communicates the magnitude of the productivity leap.
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 音乐在'多长时间'时暂停，'一天'时重新切入，节奏更有力
scenes.sfx_suggestion: 代码堆叠的纸张摩擦声，人类部分缓慢的时钟滴答声，Fable 5部分快速嗡鸣

scenes.title: 自主科研能力
scenes.narration: 但Fable 5最恐怖的能力，不是写代码。是自主科研。Mythos 5——也就是Fable 5的无限制版——被用来设计蛋白质靶向药物。14个设计中，9个进入了实际药物研发管线。它还自己训练了一个基因组学模型，用OpenAI的1%的参数规模，在特定任务上击败了发表在《Science》上的论文成果。
scenes.narration_tone: 语速不急不缓但充满分量，'不是写代码'带转折语气，'击败了发表在Science上'重音
scenes.visual_description: 分子结构的3D可视化，蛋白质折叠动画。14个蛋白质设计中9个亮起绿光。然后切换为基因组学数据对比图：小模型图标 vs 《Science》论文图标，小模型胜出。
scenes.video_prompt: A stunning molecular biology visualization. 3D protein structures rotate in space, 14 floating in a dark chamber. One by one, 9 of them glow with a golden-green light indicating successful drug candidates. The camera then transitions to a genome dataset visualization — a small compact model icon on one side, a large 'Science Journal' icon on the other. The small model outperforms with a victory pulse. Cinematic lighting with cool bioluminescent colors. Scientific visualization style blending CG animation with data overlay. The protein structures have intricate surface details. Awe-inspiring scientific breakthrough atmosphere.
scenes.image_prompt: Scientific visualization of 14 floating protein structures in a dark void. 9 are glowing with success indicators (golden-green), 4 are dim (failed), 1 is intermediate (amber). The glowing ones have intricate surface details. Below: a comparison between a small compact model icon and a 'Science' journal icon, with the small model highlighted as superior. Deep blue-black background with bioluminescent colors. Photorealistic molecular CG render. Scientific breakthrough mood. Premium research visualization aesthetic.
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 音乐转为神秘深邃的科技音，14个蛋白逐个亮起时配合微弱的音效脉冲
scenes.sfx_suggestion: 蛋白质结构旋转时的微弱能量嗡鸣，成功亮起时的柔和电子叮声

scenes.title: 自主Agent循环机制
scenes.narration: 你可能会问：它到底是怎么做到的？核心秘密是Mythos架构的'自主Agent循环'。传统模型是输入一条指令→输出一个回答。Fable 5的工作方式是：接收一个长期目标→拆解成子任务→并行执行→自我验证→迭代优化。整个过程可以持续数小时甚至数天，不需要人类介入。
scenes.narration_tone: 解释性，语速适中，关键词加重
scenes.visual_description: 循环流程图动画：一个大目标→分解为5个子任务→并行执行→验证→优化→迭代。每个步骤用不同颜色的光环表示，形成一个闭环。子Agent图标在执行时闪烁。
scenes.video_prompt: A 3D animated loop diagram materializing in space, starting from an extreme wide shot of empty dark space. The camera dollies in as a central large goal icon appears and splits into 5 smaller task nodes that spread outward in a circular pattern. The camera performs a slow orbit around the forming loop as each task node spawns a small agent figure that begins working, with progress indicators spinning around them. The results flow into a central verification node that glows green and then feeds back for optimization, creating a continuous loop. The camera continues its slow orbit as the cycle repeats. Clean motion graphics style with 3D depth. Blue and teal color scheme with the loop path glowing cyan. Dynamic particle flow along the loop paths. Educational but cinematic.
scenes.image_prompt: 3D circular flowchart visualization showing an autonomous agent loop. A central 'Goal' icon at top splits into 5 colored sub-task nodes arranged in a circle. Each node has a small agent icon. Verification and optimization nodes bridge between stages. Glowing cyan connector lines trace the loop path. Dark background with blue-teal gradient. Motion graphics meets 3D illustration. The loop suggests continuous autonomous operation. Clean, educational, premium scientific diagram aesthetic.
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 稳定的循环电子节奏，持续不断的背景节拍象征持续运行
scenes.sfx_suggestion: 任务分解时的分割声，子Agent启动的激活声，验证通过时的确认音

scenes.title: Ethan Mollick 9小时实验
scenes.narration: 我们在一个更接地气的场景里看到了这种能力：Wharton教授Ethan Mollick让Fable 5处理一份15页的项目简报。模型自主运行了9个多小时，生成了多个子Agent，做了研究，递交了完整的产品方案。9小时，全程无人干预。
scenes.narration_tone: 故事化叙述，'9个多小时'带着惊叹的语气
scenes.visual_description: 时间线动画：一份15页文档输入→Fable 5图标启动→9小时时间压缩→拆分出多个子Agent→最终输出完整方案。时间线上显示关键里程碑。
scenes.video_prompt: A time-lapse visualization starting with a medium wide shot of a dark digital space. A 15-page document icon enters frame from the left with a smooth slide-in animation, landing in a central Fable 5 processing core. The camera pushes in slightly as the core begins pulsing and a 9-hour timeline extends horizontally to the right with a tracking camera movement. On the timeline, small agent nodes split off at various points with whip-pan transitions between milestones, each working on subtasks. The timeline compresses with a speed-ramp effect. Finally, a completed product proposal emerges from the right side of the core as the camera pulls back to reveal the full output. Cinematic lighting focused on the central core. Motion graphics with premium 3D elements.
scenes.image_prompt: Infographic timeline: a 15-page document icon enters a glowing Fable 5 processing core, then a 9-hour timeline extends to the right with agent branching points along the way. A completed product proposal emerges at the end. Dark navy background with cool blue and teal highlights. The timeline has subtle glow effects at each milestone. Premium 3D motion graphics aesthetic. The visual communicates deep autonomous work over extended time.
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 节奏稳步推进，9小时时间轴压缩时音乐速度稍微变化模拟加速感
scenes.sfx_suggestion: 文档输入时的纸张声，Agent分支时的激活声，最终输出时的完成音

scenes.title: Humanity's Last Exam对比
scenes.narration: 那Fable 5到底比之前的Opus 4.8强多少？我们用一组基准测试来说话。Humanity's Last Exam——这是目前最难的综合知识测试，人类顶级专家平均只能拿40%。Opus 4.8达到了57.9%，Fable 5达到了64.5%——已经超过参与测试的绝大多数人类专家。
scenes.narration_tone: 数据解说语气，'已经超过'自豪地强调
scenes.visual_description: 知识测试得分对比：人类专家40%（虚线）→ Opus 4.8 57.9% → Fable 5 64.5%。Fable 5的柱子超出虚线一大截，顶部有'超越人类'的标签动画。
scenes.video_prompt: A 3D benchmark comparison visualization. A baseline dotted line at 40% labeled 'Human Experts' appears first. Then a bar for Opus 4.8 rises to 57.9% in cool blue. Finally a bar for Fable 5 rises dramatically to 64.5% in vibrant green, surpassing the human baseline by a wide margin. A 'Surpassing Human Experts' text badge materializes with a flash above the Fable 5 bar. The camera does a slow orbit around the chart. Premium motion graphics style with 3D elements and subtle particle effects. Clean typography with benchmark name displayed prominently. Awe-inspiring data visualization.
scenes.image_prompt: 3D bar chart for 'Humanity's Last Exam' benchmark. Three data points: human experts baseline at 40% (dotted line, gray), Opus 4.8 at 57.9% (blue bar), Fable 5 at 64.5% (green bar). The Fable 5 bar clearly surpasses the human baseline. '超越人类专家' badge appears above the highest bar. Dark background with professional lighting. Clean data visualization aesthetic with premium production value. 8K render quality.
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 数据展示时的节奏感加强，Fable 5超越人类基线时音乐有一个小高潮
scenes.sfx_suggestion: 人类基线出现时的中性提示音，Fable 5超越时的'突破'音效

scenes.title: FrontierCode & OSWorld对比
scenes.narration: 再看FrontierCode Diamond——这是编程领域的'珠峰'，测试模型解决极其复杂的工程问题的能力。Opus 4.8是13.4%，已经很强了。Fable 5是29.3%。是两倍还多。而GPT-5.5只有5.7%。差距大到我已经不知道该怎么描述了。还有OSWorld——测试模型在计算机上的操作能力，Fable 5达到了85%。这意味着它不仅会思考，还能动手。
scenes.narration_tone: 语速逐渐加快，情绪递进，'差距大到我已经不知道该怎么描述了'带着真切的感叹
scenes.visual_description: 双数据图表并排展示。左图FrontierCode Diamond：Fable 5 29.3%的柱子是Opus 4.8 13.4%的两倍多。右图OSWorld：Fable 5 85%的柱子几乎触顶。
scenes.video_prompt: A dual-panel 3D data visualization. Left panel: FrontierCode Diamond benchmark showing three bars — Fable 5 at 29.3% (green, twice the height of others), Opus 4.8 at 13.4% (blue), GPT-5.5 at 5.7% (amber). The Fable 5 bar has a x2 multiplier badge. Right panel: OSWorld benchmark showing Fable 5 at 85% (green bar nearly reaching the top), with Opus 4.8 at 83.4% (blue) and GPT-5.5 at 76.2% (amber). A 'Think + Act' badge connects the two panels. The camera pans slowly between the two charts. Cinematic data visualization style with dramatic lighting. Clean, premium Bloomberg-terminal inspired aesthetic.
scenes.image_prompt: Split data visualization with two panels. Left: 'FrontierCode Diamond' — Fable 5 at 29.3% bar (green) is twice as tall as Opus 4.8 at 13.4% (blue) and far taller than GPT-5.5 at 5.7% (amber). Right: 'OSWorld' — Fable 5 at 85% (green) near the top, Opus 4.8 at 83.4% (blue), GPT-5.5 at 76.2% (amber). Dark background. A '思考 + 行动' badge bridges the two charts. Premium infographic style with 3D elements. 8K render quality.
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 双数据展示时音乐节奏双倍速，两端数据切换时快速过渡
scenes.sfx_suggestion: 数据柱子攀升的双重嗖声，差距展示时的惊叹式气声

scenes.title: Fable 5的局限与安全设计
scenes.narration: 当然，Fable 5也有缺点。它很贵——输入每百万tokens 10美元，输出50美元。是Opus 4.8的两倍。而且Fable 5有安全护栏：任何涉及网络安全攻防、生物化学武器、模型蒸馏的请求，会被自动路由到Opus 4.8处理。这是个有意识的设计选择——强大但受控。
scenes.narration_tone: 态度诚恳，不加掩饰，'强大但受控'平稳有力
scenes.visual_description: Fable 5芯片周围出现三个守卫光环：Cybersecurity、Bio/Chem、Distillation。点击/触摸它们的请求被重定向到标有Opus 4.8的通道。旁边显示价格标签：$10/$50 per 1M tokens。
scenes.video_prompt: A 3D visualization of Fable 5's safety architecture. A glowing Fable 5 core is surrounded by three rotating guardrail rings colored red (Cybersecurity), amber (Bio/Chem), and purple (Distillation). When a request icon approaches, the guardrails either glow green (allow) or redirect it to a separate Opus 4.8 chamber. A pricing tag floats nearby showing '$10/$50 per 1M tokens'. The camera slowly orbits the structure. Clean 3D motion graphics with security-themed visual language. Shield icons appear on each guardrail. Professional and informative atmosphere. The safety layers look protective rather than restrictive.
scenes.image_prompt: 3D visualization of Fable 5's three safety guardrails. A central Fable 5 core is surrounded by three rotating shield rings in red (Cybersecurity), amber (Bio/Chem), and purple (Distillation). A small Opus 4.8 chamber sits adjacent for redirected requests. A pricing label shows '$10/$50 per 1M tokens'. Dark background with security-themed blue and red lighting. Premium 3D infographic style. The design communicates 'powerful but controlled'. 8K resolution, clean professional aesthetic.
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 音乐转为谨慎平稳的节奏，安全主题相关的低频嗡鸣
scenes.sfx_suggestion: 守卫光环旋转时的低频嗡声，请求被拦截时的警示音，通过时的确认音

scenes.title: Mythos 5的网络安全发现
scenes.narration: 但Mythos 5——也就是无限制版——在网络安全测试中暴露了更惊人的事实：它发现了所有主流操作系统和浏览器的零日漏洞。包括一个在OpenBSD里藏了27年的bug。Cloudflare用这个模型找到了2000个漏洞。Mozilla在Firefox 150中修复了271个漏洞——比Opus 4.6在Firefox 148中发现的多了10倍以上。
scenes.narration_tone: 带着既震惊又警惕的语气，'27年的bug'放慢加重
scenes.visual_description: 全球地图上标注各操作系统/浏览器：Windows、macOS、Linux、OpenBSD、Chrome、Firefox、Safari。每个标记上闪烁'Zero-Day Found'标签。OpenBSD标记上特别显示'27-year-old bug'。右下角数据面板显示Cloudflare: 2000 bugs, Mozilla: 271 bugs。
scenes.video_prompt: A global cybersecurity threat map visualization. Operating system and browser logos appear on a dark digital world map: Windows, macOS, Linux, OpenBSD, Chrome, Firefox, Safari. Each one flashes red with a 'Zero-Day Found' alert badge. The OpenBSD logo gets a special highlighted badge '27-YEAR-OLD BUG' pulsing ominously. A data panel at the lower-right scrolls: 'Cloudflare: 2,000 bugs found', 'Mozilla Firefox 150: 271 bugs fixed (10x previous)'. The camera slowly pans across the map. Motion graphics inspired by cyber threat intelligence dashboards. Red and amber alert colors on a dark navy background. Tense, cybersecurity operations center aesthetic.
scenes.image_prompt: Cybersecurity threat map on a dark digital screen. OS and browser logos (Windows, macOS, Linux, OpenBSD, Chrome, Firefox, Safari) float over a stylized world map, all marked with red 'Zero-Day' alerts. OpenBSD has a special '27-year-old bug' highlight. A data sidebar shows Cloudflare 2000 and Mozilla 271 stats. Dark navy background with red and amber alert colors. Cybersecurity operations center aesthetic. Premium infographic style. Tense but professional atmosphere.
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 紧张的低频电子音，安全警报风格背景，零日漏洞出现时脉冲音
scenes.sfx_suggestion: 警报声（轻柔的）、系统扫描声、漏洞发现时的警报脉冲

scenes.title: Fable 5离AGI还有多远
scenes.narration: 好，现在让我们回到那个核心问题：Fable 5离AGI还有多远？AGI——通用人工智能——目标是让机器能在任何智力任务上达到或超越人类水平。Fable 5在特定领域已经做到了：编程超过人类中级工程师，某些科学推理超过专家，计算机操作达到85%成功率。
scenes.narration_tone: 从容、理性，像在分享深入思考
scenes.visual_description: 光谱/渐变条从左到右：Current AI → Fable 5 → AGI。Fable 5的位置标注已超越多数单任务的人类水平，但离最右侧的AGI还有一段距离。各能力领域（Coding、Science、Computer Use、Common Sense）以进度条显示。
scenes.video_prompt: A 3D spectrum/gradient bar visualization. The bar stretches from left (red: 'Current AI') through middle (amber-green: 'Fable 5') to right (gold: 'AGI'). Fable 5's position is clearly past the 'Human Expert Average' marker in multiple domains. Below the main bar, individual capability bars show: Coding (95%), Science Reasoning (85%), Computer Use (85%), Common Sense Reasoning (60%). Each bar has a small human-level reference line. The camera slowly scans across the spectrum. Clean motion graphics with 3D elements. Honest, measured, informative atmosphere. Blue to gold color gradient suggesting progress toward a goal.
scenes.image_prompt: A horizontal progress spectrum from 'Current AI' (left, red) through 'Fable 5' (center, green) to 'AGI' (right, gold). Fable 5 is past the 'Human Expert Average' line. Below: individual capability bars — Coding 95%, Science 85%, Computer Use 85%, Common Sense 60% — each with a human-level reference marker. Dark background with blue-to-gold gradient. Premium infographic style. Honest and measured aesthetic. The visual suggests significant progress but remaining distance to AGI.
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 音乐从紧张的网络安全音转为平缓、沉思的旋律，钢琴为主
scenes.sfx_suggestion: 光谱扩展时的温和滑动声

scenes.title: 冷静评估：轮廓已现，但非终点
scenes.narration: 但AGI的'通用'两个字才是最难的部分。Fable 5在需要深度推理、长期规划的任务上表现惊人，但在简单的常识推理上有时还会犯低级错误。它仍然需要人类设定目标、提供上下文、审核输出。它不是'全能'的，只是在越来越多的领域里'比大多数人强'。
scenes.narration_tone: 客观、冷静，既不高估也不低估
scenes.visual_description: 天平/平衡秤视觉：左侧是Fable 5的成就（蛋白质设计、编程、科研），右侧是尚未达到的AGI能力（常识推理、完全自主、自我意识）。中间有未完全平衡的间隙。
scenes.video_prompt: A 3D balance scale visualization. The left pan holds glowing icons representing Fable 5's achievements: a protein (Science), a code icon (Engineering), a computer (Tool Use). The right pan holds AGI-required capabilities: a brain (General Reasoning), a globe (Autonomy), a lightbulb (Consciousness). The scale is slightly tipped left, showing Fable 5's achievements are substantial but not yet balanced with full AGI requirements. Cinematic lighting with the left pan in cool blue and the right pan in warm gold. The gap between the two represents the remaining distance. Thoughtful, measured atmosphere. Premium 3D motion graphics.
scenes.image_prompt: 3D balance scale visualization. Left pan: Fable 5 achievements — protein icon, code icon, computer icon — all glowing cool blue. Right pan: AGI requirements — brain icon, globe icon, lightbulb icon — glowing warm gold. The scale is slightly tipped left, showing imbalance. Dark background with dramatic lighting. The space between the two pans represents the AGI gap. Premium 3D infographic style. Honest and measured atmosphere. 8K resolution.
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 安静的钢琴旋律，不带偏向性的中立氛围音乐
scenes.sfx_suggestion: 天平轻微摇摆的机械声

scenes.title: 莱特兄弟类比
scenes.narration: 我个人认为，Fable 5不是AGI。但它可能是第一个让我们看到了AGI轮廓的模型。就像1903年莱特兄弟的飞机——不是协和客机，但它证明了'飞'是可能的。Fable 5证明了：一个模型能够自主完成跨越多天的复杂任务、自我迭代、调用工具、生成子Agent——这些曾经被认为是AGI才有的特征。所以结论是：Fable 5不是AGI。但它是迄今为止最接近AGI的公开模型。而且它的存在本身，已经改写了AI的发展时间线。
scenes.narration_tone: 笃定有力，语速平稳，情感真挚
scenes.visual_description: 动画对比：1903年莱特兄弟的飞机缓慢飞过天空 → 渐变为现代协和客机。再切换为Fable 5抽象标识 → 渐变为未来的AGI意象（全息地球/Humanity+AI协作）。
scenes.video_prompt: A historical-to-future comparison animation. Start with a sepia-toned 1903 Wright Brothers' flyer struggling but successfully taking flight over a beach — wobbly, historic. The camera follows the flight as the sepia fades to color and the plane morphs into a sleek Concorde jet soaring confidently. Then the camera tilts up to the sky, and the scene transitions to a futuristic visualization: the Fable 5 emblem morphing into a glowing representation of AGI — a global network of light connecting all human knowledge. Emotional orchestral swell. The message is clear: this is the beginning of a new era. Nostalgic then awe-inspiring cinematic sequence.
scenes.image_prompt: Split timeline comparison. Left: sepia-toned 1903 Wright Brothers flyer in flight over a beach — historic, humble beginning. Right: a futuristic vision of AGI — a glowing global neural network connecting continents with light. The transition between them is a morphing light bridge. The composition tells the story of progress from first flight to first AGI. Cinematic still, high contrast, emotionally resonant. 8K resolution. The subtitle reads: 'From Kitty Hawk to AGI — We Are Here.'
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 情感丰富的管弦乐渐起，从莱特兄弟的质朴到现代感的升华
scenes.sfx_suggestion: 螺旋桨声 → 飞机喷气声 → 未来的能量嗡鸣

scenes.title: 结尾CTA
scenes.narration: 如果你想亲自感受Fable 5的能力，现在就可以通过claude.ai体验。前两周免费。这可能是你离未来最近的一次。如果这个视频让你对AI有了新的认识，点个关注，咱们持续追踪这个领域的变化。我是AI探索者，下期见。
scenes.narration_tone: 真诚友好，语速自然，'这可能是你离未来最近的一次'带着温度
scenes.visual_description: 品牌结尾卡：频道Logo 'AI探索者' 居中，下方出现claude.ai的URL和关注按钮。背景是动态的星空粒子效果，延续前镜头的宇宙主题。
scenes.video_prompt: A premium YouTube-style end card. The channel logo 'AI探索者' appears centered with a subtle glow reveal animation. Below it, 'claude.ai' URL fades in. A red 'Subscribe' button pulses gently with a magnetic wobble. The background is a slow-moving starfield with subtle nebula colors — deep blues and purples. All text has a clean, premium feel. The camera is static but the starfield drifts slowly. Professional YouTuber end card style. Warm and inviting atmosphere. Hold on final frame for 3 seconds.
scenes.image_prompt: YouTube end card design. Center: 'AI探索者' channel name in bold modern typography with subtle cyan glow. Below: 'claude.ai' URL in smaller font. Red 'Subscribe' button with white text. Background: deep space starfield with purple and blue nebulae. Dark gradient ensures text legibility. Premium branding aesthetic. Clean, professional, inviting. The design suggests looking toward the future — consistent with the video's theme of AI progress.
scenes.bgm_suggestion: 音乐渐弱至柔和的尾奏，最后2秒完全静音
scenes.sfx_suggestion: Logo出现时柔和的叮当声，URL淡入时的air声

outro.text: 如果你想亲自感受Fable 5的能力，现在就可以通过claude.ai体验。前两周免费。这可能是你离未来最近的一次。如果这个视频让你对AI有了新的认识，点个关注，咱们持续追踪这个领域的变化。我是AI探索者，下期见。
outro.cta_text: 点个关注，持续追踪AI前沿变化
outro.visual_description: 品牌结尾卡：频道Logo 'AI探索者' 居中，claude.ai URL和关注按钮。星空粒子背景。

Red 'Subscribe' button with white text. Dark gradient ensures all text is fully legible against the starfield background. Premium technology branding aesthetic. The color palette is deep blue, purple, with cyan accents — consistent with the video's futuristic theme. Clean, professional, inviting viewers to continue exploring AI.

production_notes.recommended_bgm: 开场: 心拍数低音 → 架构部分: 科技电子稳步推进 → 数据部分: 节奏加快 → 科研部分: 神秘深邃 → 安全部分: 紧张低频 → AGI讨论: 钢琴沉思 → 莱特兄弟: 管弦乐情感升华 → 结尾: 音乐渐弱
production_notes.special_notes: 核心风格：深蓝+绿松石色科技风。3D数据可视化部分可使用Manim或After Effects实现。蛋白质分子动画建议使用PyMOL或专业素材库。Stripe/Cloudflare等案例有公开素材。所有基准测试数据来源为Anthropic官方发布，需在视频描述中标注来源。
